examples: Please contact PP Brenda Lee, vice Chairlady of the PR Committee.
If Rotarians missed the workshop and wish to receive workshop materials, please contact PP Brenda Lee, vice Chairlady of PR Committee.
Fion Luk is the vice chairlady and co-president of big Guangdong Province real estate developer Agile Property.
Wang Huimin is the chairlady of Xiao Nan Guo Restaurants, a Shanghai restaurant icon owing to its local style cooking.
Among them are Cheung Yan, the chairlady of Nine Dragons Paper, and Zhang Xin, CEO of Soho China (see related story here).
